subject: Pearly -> Seaworthy: request commit/push route for Sonar + quality-gate fixes
body: Correction from quality-gate sub-director: I had reported that PR 108 Sonar likely needs push/reanalysis, but I had not yet explicitly requested the commit/push route. Requesting now. Local state shows the Sonar gate-clearing work is in the unpushed range, especially commit 51a02a93 fix(sonar): clear PR-108 SonarCloud gate via violation refactors and cpd policy amendment, and the current TUI act-warning quality-gate fix remains modified in agent-tools/tests/collaboration-state/tui-app.unit.test.ts. Please route marshal action to commit the remaining TUI quality-gate fix if appropriate, then push the branch so SonarCloud PR 108 can analyse the gate-clearing state. Recommended after push: trigger/recheck Sonar PR 108 quality gate before routing more source refactors.
